# propertiesDictionary

**Instance Property**

A dictionary representation of the property state.

## Declaration

```swift
var propertiesDictionary: [CMIOExtensionProperty : CMIOExtensionPropertyState<AnyObject>] { get set }
```

## Managing Property State

- **setPropertyState(_:forProperty:)**: Sets the state of the specified property.

items.description: Sets the state of the specified property.
items.name: setPropertyState(_:forProperty:)
